summary: GPU is 16% utilized. The dominant cause is dataloader stalls: 7416ms (99%) of GPU idle time overlaps with PyTorch DataLoader activity on the CPU.
recommended_actions: Set persistent_workers=True to avoid worker re-spawn.
Set pin_memory=True for faster H2D transfer.
Move expensive preprocessing to a separate process or use an iterable dataset.
Profile your __getitem__ and look for slow image decode or disk reads.
